title: ［闢謠］美國專家：冇證據顯示2019 ncov係lab made

replies.msg:
事源我上個月睇到份「證明」2019ncov係lab made嘅essay，因為格式同用字都唔似專業人士手筆，所以冇理會
但係呢篇essay就上咗連登熱門，仲大把人信以為真，我就將篇所謂essay send比一個外國網站，等專業人士解讀
essay：
https://s3-ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/news.guo.offload.media/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/25133703/Brief-summary-of-evidence-of-lab-finish.pdf

來自scicheck嘅回覆：
Hello,
Thanks for your question.
We have written an article that addresses your general question about whether the virus could have come from a lab (see especially, the last section). You can find that here: https://www.factcheck.org/2020/02/baseless-conspiracy-theories-claim-new-coronavirus-was-bioengineered/
In short, there is no reason to suspect this new virus was engineered, as the sequence has all the hallmarks of a virus that has been evolving in the wild.
With respect to the particular claims in the document you sent, I won’t go through it in full (and I can’t read Chinese), but nothing in it proves or even suggests that the new virus came from a lab:

1) The other viral sequences highlighted on p. 3 were identified from bats in the wild. The paper describes how these were sequenced. The fact that these are similar to the new virus is not surprising, as they are also bat SARS-like coronaviruses.

2) The screenshot of the nextstrain.org site showing the phylogeny of the viruses is missing the bat virus that has been shown to be the most similar (go ahead and check the link – the image is missing the Yunnan virus).

Again, we would expect the new virus to match other bat SARS-like coronaviruses, so none of that is unusual. The scenario outlined of various viral parts recombining is precisely the type of thing that virologists would be able to see when they analyze the sequence. It’s not there. I refer you again to the end of the other article we have written.

Hope that helps.

其中佢提及篇article都好值得睇

replies.msg:
我send封email比佢有幫佢翻譯咗部份內文，中譯英
主要就係啲報道話武漢實驗室早年發現過冠狀病毒，有對呢隻病毒做實驗同改造，原作者繼而話武漢肺炎同舊病毒、其他病毒有相同地方，suggest武漢肺炎係lab made
咁佢而家個reply就係科學角度冇證據證明武漢肺炎係被改造後嘅早年隻病毒，所有「共同點」都係好普通
即係唔可以話「你有眼耳口鼻，李嘉誠都有眼耳口鼻，所以證明你係李嘉誠個仔」
所以睇唔睇中文資料真係唔重要，只要佢知道根本只要有新一隻bat sars-like 冠狀病毒都應該預期有呢啲特徵，佢就足夠作出判斷

replies.msg:
Experts who examined Lyons-Weiler’s hypothesis found it to be scientifically unsound. Aaron Irving, a virologist and senior research fellow at Duke-NUS Medical School, pointed out that the similarity between INS1378 and pShuttle-SN is actually low, with only a 67% match between the DNA sequences. Lyons-Weiler acknowledged this finding in his article, but InfoWars and other outlets did not.

In fact, conducting a multiple sequence alignment of INS1378 against all sequences in the National Center for Biotechnology Information database demonstrates that INS1378 has a much higher similarity to bat coronaviruses than to pShuttle-SN, which does not even appear in the list of 100 closest matches. This result thereby refutes Lyons-Weiler’s suggestion that the “unique sequence” in 2019-nCoV is more strongly related to pShuttle-SN than to other coronaviruses.

1.唔似pshuttle
2.更似自然病毒
